mapper.select:
select board_no, board_category, board_title, board_thumb, board_writer, to_char(board_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as board_date, member_thumb from board_tbl join member_tbl on (board_writer = member_id) where board_status = #{status}
and board_category = 1
and board_category = 2
and board_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and board_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by board_no desc
order by board_no asc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
mapper.insert: insert into board_tbl ( board_no, board_category, board_title, board_content, board_thumb, board_writer, board_date, board_status, attraction_no, location_no, place_name, address_name ) values ( #{boardNo}, #{boardCategory}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{boardWriter}, sysdate, 1, #{attractionNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{locationNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{placeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select board_no, board_category, board_title, board_content, board_writer, to_char(board_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as board_date, place_name, address_name, member_thumb from board_tbl join member_tbl on (board_writer = member_id) where board_no = #{boardNo}
select count(*) from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo}
select count(*) from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_Id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into board_comment_tbl ( board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status ) values ( #{boardCommentNo}, #{boardCommentContent}, #{boardCommentWriter}, #{boardNo}, sysdate, 1 )
mapper.select: select board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status, member_thumb from board_comment_tbl join member_tbl on(board_comment_writer = member_id) where board_no = #{boardNo} order by board_comment_no

select board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status, member_thumb from board_comment_tbl join member_tbl on (board_comment_writer = member_id) where board_comment_no = #{boardCommentNo}
